---
title: "Books"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Scientific Books

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
library(patchwork)

sci_books <- read_csv("data/scientific_books.csv")
datatable(sci_books,
          escape = FALSE,
          rownames = FALSE)
```

##
